info.description: Tracks guest visitors who arrived via an affiliate link. Used to attribute sign-ups.

ipSignatureHash.description: SHA-256 hash of browser fingerprint: IP + UserAgent + screen + timezone

affiliateCode.description: The raw affiliate code from the URL param (?ref=CODE)

affiliateOwner.description: Resolved user who owns this affiliate code

convertedUser.description: Set once a user registers and matches this impression

converted.description: True once a registration has been matched to this impression
